Join 400+ realtors across the Carolinas who rely on Square Up Measuring for accurate floor plans and professional listing photos — delivered next day.

Why Realtors Choose Us

⚡

Next-Day Delivery

Book today, receive your floor plan and photos by 9AM the next business day.

📐

ANSI-Compliant

Every floor plan follows ANSI Z765 — the standard your MLS and buyers expect.

📞

Realtor-Focused

We understand your timeline. Easy booking, fast communication, no runaround.

🏅

Trusted by 400+

Hundreds of realtors across Charlotte and the Carolinas rely on us every week.

How It Works

01

Book Online

Fill out our quick booking form with your listing address and preferred date.

02

We Visit

Our certified measurer or photographer comes to the property at your scheduled time.

03

Get Delivered

Your floor plan and photos hit your inbox by 9AM the next business day.

Ready for Next-Day Delivery?

Book your measurement or photography session today. We cover the entire Carolinas and guarantee next-business-day delivery.
